testcase.name: test_chart_of_accounts_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 without auth, got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_dashboard_accounting.py:393: in test_chart_of_accounts_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 without auth, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
